error_message: cannot borrow `buf` as immutable because it is also borrowed as mutable
error_snippet:
|
239 | let r1 = sha1(&mut buf, 64 + len, buf.len(), hash);
    |          ---- --------            ^^^ immutable borrow occurs here
    |          |    |
    |          |    mutable borrow occurs here
    |          mutable borrow later used by call

error_message: cannot borrow `buf` as immutable because it is also borrowed as mutable
error_snippet:
|
261 | sha1(&mut buf, 64 + 20, buf.len(), hash)
    | ---- --------           ^^^ immutable borrow occurs here
    | |    |
    | |    mutable borrow occurs here
    | mutable borrow later used by call

For more information about this error, try `rustc --explain E0502`.
